# Kalēa®

> Kalēa® is an Italian general contractor and luxury supply hub for designed floors, walls, ceilings and outdoor surfaces — featuring magnesium-oxide BIOMAG FLOOR®, natural-fiber HYPERMATT, SPC Hypermatt, Externo decking and exclusive ceramic selections.

Kalēa® combines proprietary product lines with a curated supply of luxury surfaces for architects, interior designers, surveyors, construction companies and private clients. All products are waterproof, click-installed (Välinge 5G) and Designed in Italy.

## Pages

- [Home](/it): Overview of the Kalēa® universe and product lines.
- [Indoor surfaces](/it/indoor): Indoor floors, walls and ceilings.
- [Outdoor surfaces](/it/outdoor): Outdoor decking and ceramic floors.
- [BIOMAG FLOOR®](/it/biomag-floor): Magnesium-oxide flooring — waterproof, fireproof, click-clack.
- [HYPERMATT](/it/hypermatt): Natural-fiber floating floor, biodegradable.
- [Hypermatt XL](/it/hypermatt-xl): Ultra-matte SPC large-format planks.
- [Hypermatt Spina](/it/hypermatt-spina): Ultra-matte SPC herringbone.
- [Hypermatt 55](/it/hypermatt-55): Ultra-matte SPC 55 collection.
- [Externo](/it/externo): Outdoor decking system.
- [Ceramiche Interni](/it/ceramiche-interni): Curated indoor ceramic selection.
- [Ceramiche Esterni](/it/ceramiche-esterni): Curated outdoor ceramic selection.
- [BIOWALL®](/it/biowall): Wall cladding system.
- [KALEABASE®](/it/kaleabase): Base / sub-floor system.
- [EDGELINE®](/it/edgeline): Profiles and finishing edges.
- [Realizzazioni](/it/realizzazioni): Project gallery.
- [Area Tecnica](/it/area-tecnica): Technical documents and downloads.
- [Normative](/it/normative): Standards and certifications.
- [Chi Siamo](/it/chi-siamo): Company and founder story.
- [Contatti](/it/contatti): Contact form for samples, quotes, info.
- [Diventa Partner](/it/diventa-partner): Partnership program for professionals.

## Sustainability

- [Environmental impact](/it/sostenibilita/impatto-ambientale): Mineral materials, low emissions.
- [Long-lasting](/it/sostenibilita/lunga-durata): Dimensional stability and durability.
- [Maintenance](/it/sostenibilita/manutenzione): Easy cleaning and care.

- [Privacy](/it/privacy): Privacy policy.
